data.title: Core PCE Inflation Rate Expected To Slow In January
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Nick Timiraos, often referred to as the 'Fed's mouthpiece,' reported that economists converting CPI and PPI into PCE anticipate a 0.27% rise in core prices for January. 

The core prices had previously increased by 0.50% in January 2024. Due to this base effect, the 12-month core PCE inflation rate is expected to slow from 2.8% in December to 2.6%.

data.title: Tether CEO Predicts Bitcoin-Dominated Future Amid Fiat Currency Collapse
data.description:
According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino expressed his views in a recent blog post, identifying himself as a Bitcoin Maximalist. Ardoino believes that all fiat currencies will eventually collapse due to their inherent flaws, leading to a financial reset characterized by hyperinflation. Despite USDT being a stablecoin with a market capitalization exceeding $140 billion, Ardoino views it as merely a transitional tool to help economies shift towards a Bitcoin-dominated future. He emphasized Bitcoin's resilience, claiming it is the only currency capable of enduring for the next 2000 years.

Furthermore, as Tether faces challenges from stringent regulations, Ardoino highlighted the company's focus on emerging markets. He also noted Tether's recent investments in Latin America, particularly in green energy, artificial intelligence, and agriculture.

data.title: Fed Hammark: No support for rate hikes, Fed can continue to steadily shrink its balance sheet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cleveland Fed President Hammack believes that the Fed can continue to steadily reduce its balance sheet during a period of government fiscal uncertainty, while she noted that she is not inclined to support rate hikes even if inflationary pressures do not subside quickly enough. Hammack said her "baseline preference" is that the Fed continues to advance the reduction of its balance sheet while the government sorts out its spending plans and adjusts the debt ceiling to meet its borrowing needs. Hammack said in an interview on Thursday that after the fiscal path becomes clear, if there is a structural imbalance in market liquidity, temporary repurchase operations can be used to "re-inject liquidity into the system until the market demand is understood." She also said that if inflationary pressures remain above the 2% target, she does not expect to raise interest rates, but the possibility of a rate hike is not zero. But so far, "I think (expectations) are still stable." (Jinshi)

data.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $3.2 billion over the past eight days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News As the wider cryptocurrency and stock market sell-offs, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen net outflows of $3.2 billion in the past eight days. The eight-day consecutive net outflow is tied with the record of consecutive net outflows in August 2024, becoming the longest net outflow cycle since the establishment of the Bitcoin Fund. With the latest net outflows, the cumulative total net inflows of 12 Bitcoin funds are now $36.85 billion, the lowest level since January 14. The total net assets of these ETFs are $94.3 billion, accounting for about 5.7% of Bitcoin's market value. At the same time, the spot Ethereum ETF also witnessed a net outflow of $71 million on Thursday, with a total net outflow of $315 million for six consecutive days. (The Block)

data.title: Tether CEO: Bitcoin is the only currency that can exist in the next 2,000 years, USDT is just a transitional tool
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, said in his latest blog that he is a Bitcoin Maximalist. He believes that all fiat currencies will eventually collapse due to their inherent defects, leading to a financial reset characterized by hyperinflation. Although USDT is a stablecoin with a market value of more than $140 billion, Ardoino believes that USDT is only a transitional tool to help the economy transition to a Bitcoin-dominated future. He emphasized the resilience of Bitcoin, claiming that it is the only currency that can survive for the next 2,000 years. In addition, as Tether faces challenges with strict regulation, Ardoino also emphasized the company's focus on emerging markets and its recent investments in green energy, artificial intelligence, and agriculture in Latin America. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches Informal Advisory Group EF Silviculture Society
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ethereum Foundation announced the launch of the informal advisory group EF Silviculture Society on the X platform. The members are all from external individuals and aim to provide informal advice to the Ethereum Foundation EF to ensure that the core values ​​of open source, privacy, security and resistance to censorship are maintained.

data.title: LBank has launched EGGS U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the EGGS U-based perpetual contract at 19:00 (SGT) on February 28, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: The Chinese Embassy in South Korea released a case of "pig killing" involving virtual currency, with the amount involved exceeding 300,000 yuan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Chinese Embassy in South Korea’s official account published a typical case of a virtual currency “pig-killing scheme”, revealing that a foreign student believed in making money by “speculating in virtual currency” under the love offensive of his girlfriend and handed over his account to his girlfriend for custody, and transferred more than 300,000 yuan to “recharge”. The Chinese Embassy in South Korea reminds people that online dating is risky and do not believe in financial management that “has inside information and is guaranteed to make money”.

data.title: Stronghold shareholders vote majority in favor of merger with Bitfarms
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company Stronghold announced that its shareholders voted overwhelmingly "in favor" of the upcoming merger between Stronghold and Bitfarms Ltd. The merger agreement and plan were signed on August 21, 2024, and have been revised since then. After the merger agreement proposal is approved, the company expects the merger to be completed in March 2025, subject to the satisfaction or waiver of the remaining completion conditions. The final report on the results of the special shareholders meeting will be submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in the form of Form 8-K. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Chiliz announces launch of '.CHZ' domain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chiliz, a blockchain platform focusing on the sports field, announced that it has cooperated with domain name service provider Freename to launch the ".CHZ" domain name to support users to use Web3 identities to participate in the Ethereum environment, interact with decentralized applications (dApps) on the chain and seamlessly exchange ERC-20 tokens. (globenewswire)
